title: Plumber
tagline: Pipe runs, leak diagnosis, service calls with Spanish-speaking crews.
chapterIntro: Plumbing work moves fast. When water is spraying from a wall or the inspector is arriving in thirty minutes, language clarity prevents costly mistakes. This chapter teaches you to diagnose problems, give urgent instructions, and coordinate with Spanish-speaking crews on site. You'll learn the anatomy of water systems, the vocabulary of pressure and flow, and how to describe what you see to a plumber who speaks only Spanish.

grammarFocus.title: Urgent Commands with Time Pressure: Before/After Constructions
grammarFocus.explanation: In plumbing emergencies, you must give rapid instructions and describe what must happen before an inspection or before more damage occurs. Spanish uses 'antes de' (before) and 'después de' (after) + infinitive to show sequence and urgency.

structure.name: Antes de + infinitive (Before doing X)
structure.rule: antes de + INFINITIVE. Use to state what must happen first.

examples.en: Before you cut that line, shut off the main valve.
examples.es: Antes de cortar esa línea, cierra la válvula principal.

examples.en: Before the inspector arrives, we need to finish the rough-in.
examples.es: Antes de que llegue el inspector, necesitamos terminar el rough-in.
examples.breakdown: Antes de que (before that) + llegue (arrives-SUBJ) + infinitive mood for future condition

structure.name: Después de + infinitive (After doing X)
structure.rule: después de + INFINITIVE. Use to state what comes next.

examples.en: After you solder that joint, let it cool for five minutes.
examples.es: Después de soldar esa unión, déjala enfriar cinco minutos.

examples.en: After we test the pressure, we can cap off the line.
examples.es: Después de probar la presión, podemos tapar la línea.

structure.name: Tener que + infinitive (Have to / Must)
structure.rule: tener que + INFINITIVE. Standard way to express obligation under pressure.

examples.en: We have to find that leak before the drywall goes up.
examples.es: Tenemos que encontrar esa fuga antes de que suban el drywall.

examples.en: You have to pressure-test every connection before signing off.
examples.es: Tienes que probar la presión en cada conexión antes de firmar.

grammarFocus.practicePrompt: Construct three urgent plumbing instructions using 'antes de', 'después de', and 'tener que'.

extendedVocab.context: General term; tubería often used for larger runs, tubo for fittings
Elbow, tee, coupling—any connector
Main water shut-off; also llave de paso
Waste water exit
Fuga: major leak; goteo: slow drip
Water pressure in PSI (libras por pulgada cuadrada)
Joining copper with solder (estaño)
Calefón more common in Latin America
First-phase pipe layout before walls close
Official check before concealment
Most common in residential
Drain, waste, vent lines
Hot water safe plastic
Older homes; prone to mineral buildup
90-degree or 45-degree bend
Three-way branch fitting
Joins two pipes of same diameter
U-bend under sink that holds water to prevent sewer gas
Allows sewer gas to escape
Drainage pipes must have 1/4-inch drop per foot

phrases.en: There's a leak under the kitchen sink. Can you find the source?
phrases.es: Hay una fuga bajo el lavaplatos. ¿Puedes encontrar la fuente?

phrases.en: The water pressure is too low in the master bath. What could cause that?
phrases.es: La presión del agua es demasiado baja en el baño principal. ¿Qué podría causar eso?

phrases.en: We have to pressure-test all the rough-in before the wall inspection.
phrases.es: Tenemos que probar la presión en todo el rough-in antes de la inspección de pared.

phrases.en: Shut off the main valve before you start cutting into that wall.
phrases.es: Cierra la válvula principal antes de empezar a cortar esa pared.

phrases.en: After you solder that joint, let it cool completely before we test it.
phrases.es: Después de soldar esa unión, déjala enfriar completamente antes de probarla.

phrases.en: The inspector is coming in two hours. We need to finish the rough-in now.
phrases.es: El inspector viene en dos horas. Necesitamos terminar el rough-in ahora.

phrases.en: Is this copper or galvanized steel? We treat them differently.
phrases.es: ¿Es cobre o acero galvanizado? Los tratamos diferente.

phrases.en: The water heater is leaking from the drain valve. It needs to be replaced.
phrases.es: El calentador de agua está goteando por la válvula de drenaje. Necesita ser reemplazado.

phrases.en: Run the supply line to that outlet before you close up the wall.
phrases.es: Corre la línea de suministro a esa salida antes de cerrar la pared.

phrases.en: Check the trap under the sink—I think it's blocked.
phrases.es: Revisa el sifón bajo el lavaplatos. Creo que está bloqueado.

phrases.en: Before we cover the wall, the inspector has to sign off on the rough-in.
phrases.es: Antes de cubrir la pared, el inspector tiene que firmar el rough-in.

phrases.en: That pitch is wrong. The drain line needs to slope down toward the main stack.
phrases.es: Esa inclinación es incorrecta. La línea de desagüe necesita inclinarse hacia el tubo principal.

fillInBlanks.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct form of the verb.
fillInBlanks.sentence: Antes de ________ (cortar) esa tubería, tenemos que cerrar la válvula principal.
fillInBlanks.english: Before cutting that pipe, we have to close the main valve.

fillInBlanks.sentence: ________ de soldar, espera cinco minutos antes de probar la presión.
fillInBlanks.english: After soldering, wait five minutes before testing the pressure.

fillInBlanks.sentence: El inspector llega en una hora. ________ terminar el rough-in ahora.
fillInBlanks.english: The inspector arrives in one hour. We have to finish the rough-in now.

fillInBlanks.sentence: Necesitamos probar la presión ________ la pared se cierre.
fillInBlanks.english: We need to test the pressure before the wall closes.

fillInBlanks.prompt: Fill in the phrase meaning 'after we find.'
fillInBlanks.sentence: ________ encontrar la fuga, podemos reparar la tubería.
fillInBlanks.english: After we find the leak, we can repair the pipe.

translateTasks.prompt: Translate to Spanish: 'Shut off the main valve before you cut the line.'
translateTasks.answer: Cierra la válvula principal antes de cortar la línea.
alternates: Cierra la válvula de cierre antes de que cortes la línea.

translateTasks.prompt: Translate to Spanish: 'After you solder the joint, we have to test the pressure.'
translateTasks.answer: Después de soldar la unión, tenemos que probar la presión.
alternates: Después de que sueldes la unión, tenemos que probar la presión.

translateTasks.prompt: Translate to Spanish: 'The inspector is coming before the wall is closed.'
translateTasks.answer: El inspector viene antes de que la pared se cierre.
alternates: El inspector llega antes de cerrar la pared.

translateTasks.prompt: Translate to Spanish: 'We need to finish the rough-in after the pressure test passes.'
translateTasks.answer: Necesitamos terminar el rough-in después de que la prueba de presión pase.
alternates: Tenemos que terminar el rough-in después de la prueba de presión.

culturalNote: In Spanish-speaking countries, plumbing terminology varies by region. In Mexico and Central America, 'tubo' is standard; in Argentina and parts of South America, 'caño' is common. Spain uses 'tubería' more formally. On job sites, crews often code-switch rapidly—Spanish for safety instructions, English for technical product names (PVC, CPVC, trap). Learning your crew's regional preference and matching it builds trust quickly. Also note: in many Latin American countries, inspectors ('inspectores') have different authority levels than in the U.S. system; clarify what 'inspection' means before work—it may require prior scheduling or specific certifications your crew must present.
